options.name: --api-key
options.description: The API key for the server.

options.name: --configuration
options.description:
The configuration to use for building the package.
Defaults to Release.

options.name: --project
options.description:
The project to operate on. If a file is not
specified, the command will search the current
directory for one.

options.name: --changelog
options.description:
Relative path to the changelog file. Default, to
ChangelogFile attributes if found in the project file
or CHANGELOG.md in last resort.
